scripts.build: npm run build -w @proximityauth/web && npm run build -w @proximityauth/daemon
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @proximityauth/web && npm run lint -w @proximityauth/daemon
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @proximityauth/web && npm run typecheck -w @proximityauth/daemon && npm run typecheck -w @proximityauth/mobile
